title: Cute Happy Ghast
description: Cute Happy Ghast Resourcepack. 可爱恶魂材质包。
body:
A cute‑style Happy Ghast texture pack that changes the textures of both the Happy Ghast and the Ghastling. It also replaces the humming sound of the Happy Ghast with the sound of the Ghastling — because the small one sounds just too adorable.

Original texture author: Dai-Ray  [Homepage](https://space.bilibili.com/308868441)

Original texture release video: [【我的世界最新快照善魂超级可爱材质包，它来啦！】](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1kLdNYYE5M/?share_source=copy_web&vd_source=506d0f6dfc1b9a6dc5480021f490a475) 

---

一款可爱风格的快乐恶魂材质包，修改了快乐恶魂和小恶魂的材质，同时将快乐恶魂的哼唱音效（空闲时随机播放的声音）更改为小恶魂的音效（小恶魂的音效太可爱了）。

材质原作者：Dai-Ray  [主页](https://space.bilibili.com/308868441)

原材质发布视频：[【我的世界最新快照善魂超级可爱材质包，它来啦！】](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1kLdNYYE5M/?share_source=copy_web&vd_source=506d0f6dfc1b9a6dc5480021f490a475)
